{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220549139303C59AFB6C90109FE5"}"},"total":1613},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7282073602177090356","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"良心作者，为了晒鱼货还特意写了本书[奸笑]相比周姐，我还是更喜欢彭彤影[奸笑][奸笑][奸笑]三本书越来越好看，加油加油[赞][赞][赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1695492166,"group_id":"7211207985282944032","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2f8hspFhkF94iaV4Ge4/ga+YghtovH2OO+AlQOh62Ed","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cd9fab87101343daa2926a47377b4833~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706475&x-signature=SpH%2Fhk6A3xj8AiyaIyesoYaOA8U%3D","user_id":"4073041809915607","user_name":"丶烟囱"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4073041809915607","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1770965746,"is_worn":false,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":33,"name":"巅峰品鉴官","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7211207985282944032","book_info":{"abstract":"休闲文(钓鱼+赶海)
失业青年苏叶准备回家休息一段时间，大海，蓝天，白云，最能治愈人心。
苏叶发现，钓钓鱼、赶赶海、打打渔，再养一只阿猫阿狗，这样的生活好像也挺不错的样子，就是父母看自己的眼神好像越来越不对劲！
第一天钓鱼，钓获大青斑，母亲喜笑颜开。
第二天钓鱼，钓获一箱全世界最好吃的黄脚腊，母亲一边忙碌杀鱼一边碎碎念。
第三天钓鱼，钓获一麻袋乌头鱼！母亲手中的刀闪烁着寒光，眼中已经有了杀气！
不过，把鱼卖了好像也是个不错的选择？至此，苏叶开启了搞鱼卖钱的生活。
希望本文能给忙碌生活中的朋友们带来一丝欢乐。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a2a258bc8bdca56cfa1ea59daaf3e2ed","author":"清茶乏味","author_id":"","book_id":"7211207985282944032","book_name":"钓鱼人生：从钓到大石斑鱼开始","book_short_name":"钓鱼日记","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#005880","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":493,"name":"钓鱼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=493&name=钓鱼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7217826587473871395","read_count":"44987","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1437764"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"690","tags":"都市种田,都市,钓鱼","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/2120d3e09db9434fb3dd3584a5d0ce50~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779313753&x-signature=2DqplbA6R3bdvNLW1UbAtYGx2vI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2836394840701704","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"6.6482095e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220549139303C59AFB6C90109FE5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读18小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":37,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":66481,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":30081},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7375725718218457880","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"语言幽默风趣，内容很生活化，很有代入感，能让人和主角一起感悟钓鱼的生活，同时，
